last_cycle.summary: Q198 done: AND-frac vs softmax OOD (LibriSpeech→L2-ARCTIC). Spearman rho=-0.78 vs -0.51; AND-frac 3x more sensitive to shift; alarm threshold 97%TPR/0%FPR. Next: Q200 acoustic conditions or Q201 MATS demo.
